name: The Sysop
subtitle: the keeper at ember.ash.rest.bbs

ultimate_ability.label: The Long Signal
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game, transmit a message that everyone in the room reads. The next visitor in any space arrives on the next turn, no matter where they were scheduled.

notes: Sysop's hand is the keeper-of-the-room loop — BOOT / WELCOME / TRANSMIT / RECEIVE as starters. Buyable pool is THREADS (recurring board posts that bear over multiple turns). Second stat is DOUBT (rises bad). Signal is the positive doom-clock; Doctrine is the spendable currency. Spec: lore/_TAROT_GAUNTLET_SCENARIOS.md.
